mapper.select: select m.messageId, m.fromId, u.username as fromName, m.sessionId, m.content, m.postTime, m.isRevoked, m.isRead, m.imageUrl from message m, user u where m.sessionId = #{sessionId} and m.fromId = u.userId order by m.postTime asc limit 100

select m.messageId, m.fromId, u.username as fromName, m.sessionId as groupId, m.content, m.postTime, m.isRevoked, m.isRead, m.imageUrl from message m, user u where m.sessionId = #{groupId} and m.fromId = u.userId order by m.postTime asc limit 100
mapper.insert: insert into message (fromId, sessionId, content, postTime, isRevoked, isRead, imageUrl) values (#{fromId}, #{sessionId}, #{content}, now(), 0, 0, #{imageUrl})
mapper.update: update message set isRevoked = 1 where messageId = #{messageId}
update message set isRead = 1 where messageId = #{messageId}
update message set isRead = 1 where sessionId = #{sessionId} and fromId != #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from message where sessionId = #{sessionId} and fromId != #{userId} and isRead = 0

select m.*, u.username as fromName from message m, user u, message_session_user s where m.fromId = u.userId and m.sessionId = s.sessionId and s.userId = #{userId} and m.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by m.postTime desc limit 50
